title: Golden Dandelion Baby Glow
description: A datapack/mod that grants a golden glowing effect to AgeLocked entities when a player holds a Golden Dandelion in the offhand.
body:
### Overview:
Enhance your Minecraft world by giving AgeLocked entities a golden glowing effect whenever a player holds a Golden Dandelion in their offhand.

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### Features:
* Automatically detects AgeLocked entities (like baby mobs locked at their current age).
* Applies a temporary golden glow to highlight them.
* Compatible with Minecraft 1.26.5+ and designed to work with future versions.

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### Why Use This Datapack?
- Easily track AgeLocked mobs in your world.
- Adds a fun, visual effect without changing gameplay mechanics.
- Lightweight and server-friendly.

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### Demo / Video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MYeGOoQ9lEI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

### Installation:
1. Download and place the datapack in your world’s `datapacks` folder.
2. Reload or restart your world.
3. Hold a Golden Dandelion in your offhand to activate the effect.

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

> Enjoy a simple, visual way to track AgeLocked entities in Minecraft!
